source: [Airbnb Embedding] Real-time Personalization using Embeddings for Search Ranking at Airbnb (Airbnb 2018)

concepts.finding: Two embedding types: (1) Listing embeddings from click sessions (800M sessions) for short-term personalization - skip-gram with booked listing as global context. (2) User-type & listing-type embeddings from booking sequences for long-term personalization. Key innovations: congregated search negative sampling (same-market negatives), rejections as explicit negatives, cold-start via metadata.
concepts.implication: For keyword clustering: (1) Use booked/converted sessions as global context to anchor intent clusters. (2) Market-specific negative sampling prevents trivial separation by domain. (3) User-type embeddings address data sparsity via bucketing of attributes.
concepts.open_question: Should keyword clustering incorporate 'global context' keywords (like 'booked' items) that anchor the intent?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: Adding converted/clicked-through keywords as 'global context' during embedding training improves intent cluster coherence measured by conversion prediction.
